xwikidoc.name: SecurityAdvisoryApplicationTranslations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
# Class fields SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status=status SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_draft=Draft SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_completed=Completed SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_announced=Announced SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_status_disclosed=Disclosed SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title1=Title SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_title_hint=Title of the advisory SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product=product SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_product_hint=Impacted product (e.g. xwiki-platform, xwiki-rendering, application-change-request, etc) SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink=Advisory Link SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_advisoryLink_hint=Link of the github advisory that has been created SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo=compute embargo SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_computeEmbargo_hint=Define if the embargo date should be computed automatically from versions or not. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate=Embargo date SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_embargoDate_hint=Define a specific embargo date: this one is only taken into account if the compute embargo date flag is not checked. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss=CVSS SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvss_hint=Value of the computed CVSS on the string form. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore=CVSS Score SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_cvssScore_hint=Score corresponding to the CVSS vector. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description=Description SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_description_hint=Full content of the advisory. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride=Prevent override SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryApplicationClass_preventOverride_hint=Check to prevent overriding data in case of Github import.
SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem=Ecosystem SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_ecosystem_hint=Package ecosystem for the vulnerable package (e.g. Maven or NPM) SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId=Package Identifier SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_packageId_hint=Identifier of the vulnerable package SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange=Vulnerable versions range SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_vulnerableVersionRange_hint=Range of versions of the given package that are affected by the vulnerability SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions=Patched versions SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryImpactedPackageClass_patchedVersions_hint=List of versions of the given package that have been patched
# Sheet keys securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.description=This page controls how Security Advisory Application pages are displayed in both view and edit modes. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noObject=The current page doesn't have the expected Security Advisory Application object. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.noFields=The Security Advisory Application application doesn't have any fields to display.
# Live table generic keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.title=Page Title securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.name=Page Name securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.space=Space securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.fullname=Page full name securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.location=Location securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.author=Last Author securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creator=Creator securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.date=Date securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.doc.creationDate=Creation Date securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._avatar=Avatar securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._images=Images securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._attachments=Attachments securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions=Actions securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.edit=Edit securityadvisoryapplication.livetable._actions.delete=Delete securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.emptyvalue=-
# Live table specific keys securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.status=status securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.title1=Title securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.product=product securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.mavenModules=Maven modules securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.affectedVersions=Affected versions securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.patchedVersions=Patched versions securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.advisoryLink=Advisory Link securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.jiraTickets=JIRA Tickets securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.computeEmbargo=compute embargo securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.embargoDate=Embargo date securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvss=CVSS securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.cvssScore=CVSS Score securityadvisoryapplication.livetable.description=Description
# Other keys securityadvisoryapplication.entry.name=Security Advisory Application securityadvisoryapplication.home.right.warning=The {0}security entry space{1} is currently open to any users: you should restrict its access.
# Configuration SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit=Unit of the duration to use for the embargo computation SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_embargoDurationUnit.hint=The unit is based on ChronoUnit values (e.g. minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, etc) SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration=Duration value to use for the embargo computation SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_defaultEmbargoDuration.hint=This value computed with its unit will be added to the date of the latest patched release date for the advisory publication SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup=The group of targeted users for advisories notifications SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_securityGroup.hint=The users of this group will automatically receive notifications when an advisory is ready to be published. SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace=Security entries space location SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_dataSpace.hint=The reference of the space where to store security entries (default: SecurityAdvisoryApplication.SecurityEntries) SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser=Importer user SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_importerUser.hint=The user used as author for imported entries SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken=Github Token SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubToken.hint=The Github token to use for importing security advisories SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug=Github Repositories SecurityAdvisoryApplication.Code.SecurityAdvisoryConfigurationClass_githubRepositoriesSlug.hint=The list of Github repositories to use in automatic import. The value can be a repository slug in the form orga/repo (e.g. xwiki/xwiki-platform) or it can be an organization (e.g. xwiki).
# Administration - configuration and data migration securityadvisoryapplication.admin.settings.heading=Configuration securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.heading=Data migration securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.description=Migrate existing security advisories to the new data model: the impacted packages are moved to dedicated objects and the CVE identifier is migrated. The migration runs as a background job and is safe to run multiple times. securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.candidates=Advisories still using the legacy data model: {0} securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.button=Migrate advisories securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.success=The security advisories have been successfully migrated to the new data model. securityadvisoryapplication.admin.migration.finish.error=An error occurred while migrating some security advisories. See the log below for details. job.log.label.securityadvisory.datamigration=Migration log
# Sheet Explanations securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DRAFT=You're currently editing a draft of the advisory. Once it is complete you can mark it as completed with the button on top of the page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.COMPLETED=Now the advisory is complete, you should announce it to the dedicated channels defined in the security policy. Once the advisory is announced you can switch its status with the button on top of the page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.ANNOUNCED=This advisory has been announced. It will be automatically marked as disclosable when the embargo date will be reached. It's possible that the embargo date is not yet computed if the patched versions are not released yet. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSABLE=This advisory can now be disclosed according to its embargo date. You should request a CVE and publish it. Once done you need to mark it disclosed with the button on top of the page. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.nextstep.DISCLOSED=This advisory has been disclosed and is now public. securityadvisoryapplication.sheet.severity=Severity
# Deprecated keys securityadvisoryapplication.dataSpace.title=Data
